title: MCU Bifrost
description: adds the Bifrost from the Marvel Cinematic Universe.
body:
This is the perfect mod for anyone who wants to add the Bifrost to their minecraft experience.

Use JEI for the recipes.


This mod currently adds:

- The Bifrost

- The Bifrost Sword

- Teleportation between The End & The Overworld

- Teleportation to anywhere via co-ordinates.



If you want to make a mod review/spotlight, feel free. Just make sure to link the mod in the description.

if you use this in a modpack or server, please give credit. love you all.
